title: Issue with Task Date Display
excerpt: We are encountering an issue with the task date display across our team. Tasks scheduled for today are appearing on the “overdue” board, while tasks set for tomorrow are showing up in the “today” board. This problem has …

posts.author: anna_trunova (Anna Trunova)
posts.cookedHtml:
We are encountering an issue with the task date display across our team. Tasks scheduled for today are appearing on the “overdue” board, while tasks set for tomorrow are showing up in the “today” board. This problem has affected all team members simultaneously.

We have verified that our time zone is correctly set, and all automations seem to be functioning as expected. It appears this may be a bug. How to fix?
Is there also a way to contact monday support without landing by AI generated answers?
Thank you in Advance.
